name: Andritz AG
lede: Andritz runs six capability centers across five Indian cities. Chennai, Mandideep, New Delhi, Palwal and Bengaluru, covering engineering & design, gcc/gic and manufacturing, built over 28 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Andritz office in India. We map six, across five cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Andritz AG GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Andritz runs 6 verified GCC centers across 5 Indian cities (Chennai, Mandideep, New Delhi, Palwal, Bengaluru), covering engineering & design, gcc/gic and manufacturing. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

leaders.departments: Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement

titles.title: General Manager - Head of Department HR/IR

about.description: Andritz's India footprint covers Chennai, Mandideep, New Delhi, Palwal and Bengaluru, spanning engineering & design, gcc/gic and manufacturing. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D and HR for the group's global operations.
about.industry: Industrial Equipment and Machinery, Industrial Manufacturing

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 28 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Andritz operate in India?
faq.a: Andritz operates 6 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Andritz have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Andritz's India GCC footprint spans Chennai, Mandideep, New Delhi, Palwal and Bengaluru.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Andritz run in India?
faq.a: Andritz runs engineering & design, gcc/gic and manufacturing centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Andritz's India GCCs?
faq.a: Andritz's India centers employ in the 1,000 to 5,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Andritz's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 28 leaders at Andritz's India centers, across Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
